status: SOTA — beats shipped PCA(3) on 4/4; beats PCA(16) oracle on pos-cluster; ties oracle on knn5/nn_role within 0.3pp
summary: Hill-climb step: added supervised contrastive loss on position labels (--con-w 0.5). Leave-one-competition-out on tm_9ctx improves all three role-recovery metrics vs v1 baseline and closes the PCA(16) oracle gap on pos-cluster (+5.1pp over oracle). Recon MAE slightly worse than v1 (0.496 vs 0.477) but still beats PCA(3). Final export retrained on tm_full; live vectors.json untouched. Pre-con backups: pitch_mtnn_pre_con.pt, pitch_mtnn_embeddings_pre_con.json.

architecture.fusion: GatedFusion (attention-weighted + sigmoid-gated towers + context embedding -> 24-d, L2-normalized)
architecture.loss: arch_w * CE + prof_w * smooth_l1 + con_w * SupCon  (arch_w=1.0, prof_w=0.5, con_w=0.5)

evaluation.eval_matrix: tm_9ctx.npz (2295 rows, 9 contexts) — detail in tm_9ctx_con05_report.json

oracle_reference.verdict: BEATS PCA(16) on pos-cluster (+5.1pp); within 0.11pp knn5 and 0.26pp nn_role

evaluation.verdict: beats shipped PCA(3) on 4/4; promotes over v1 on role metrics

verify_commands: python -c "import json,numpy as np; d=json.load(open('assets/pitch_mtnn_embeddings.json',encoding='utf-8')); E=np.array([p['e_p'] for p in d['players']]); print(len(d['players']), E.shape, np.linalg.norm(E,axis=1).min(), np.linalg.norm(E,axis=1).max())"

next_steps.unified_reload: Re-export unified matrix / re-run Stage 1 warm-start if e_p change should propagate (optional; shipped unified.json still uses prior e_p until rebuild).
next_steps.future_pitch: Tune con_w (0.25/0.75); deeper towers; more StatsBomb seasons.

deploy.note: CV metrics from tm_9ctx LOO; shipped e_p from tm_full full-corpus refit.
